examples: Unfortunately, the adaptations that enable carnivorous plants to thrive in marginal habitats also make them exquisitely sensitive.
Chlorophyll, although exquisitely evolved to capture the energy of sunlight, can sometimes be overwhelmed by it, especially in situations of drought, low temperatures, or nutrient deficiency.
It is an exquisitely beautiful spot.
He barely touched the exquisitely prepared lamb that had been placed in front of him.
The present value of future federal revenues is exquisitely sensitive to the rate of economic growth.
